recentArticles.title: Michael Japan Box Office: King Of Pop's Biopic Becomes 2026's 3rd Highest-Grossing Hollywood Release - Koimoi
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Japan Box Office: King Of Pop’s Biopic Becomes 2026’s 3rd Highest-Grossing Hollywood Release. Michael might have slowed down at the North American box office, but it is still hot in Japan. The movie is on track to earn strong numbers at the Japan box office in its third weekend. The King of Pop’s biopic has become one of the biggest Hollywood releases of the year at the box office in Japan. This strong hold at the box office in Japan and Russia could propel it past the **$1 billion** milestone worldwide. The music biopic’s strong run in Russia and Japan is also adding to its worldwide gross. #### **Michael emerges as the 3rd highest-grossing Hollywood release of the year at the box office in Japan**. The music biopic dropped by **27.5%** from last Saturday, and with that, the movie’s box office collection in Japan has hit **$23.1 million**.

recentArticles.title: Adult DVD announce debut self titled album - Northern Transmissions
recentArticles.snippet: Adult DVD will release their self-titled debut album on September 25th on Fat Possum Records. Along with the news, the UK band are sharing new single “Cowboy On Aisle Three.” Adult DVD have had a busy year, appearing at Brighton’s The Great Escape and SXSW in Austin. A relentless touring schedule in 2025 saw them hone their status as festival headliners in waiting, picking up a global army of new fans and playing to huge crowds at Glastonbury, Green Man, End Of The Road and more. On the new album,Hanson and Lonsdale continue to take a screenwriter’s approach to songwriting, filling their lyrics with stories pulled from the outskirts of society yet painting a vivid and comic picture of modern Britain. Produced by the band at The Nave Studios Leeds, the general theme of the album is to let go and take life a little less seriously. Speaking on the new single, the band’s frontman Harry Hanson says: “I came up with the idea when I was in Lidl.

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Brings ‘4:44’ Bonus Tracks to Streaming Services on Album’s 9th Anniversary - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: About UsPrivacy PolicyTerms and ConditionsCareers Contact Us. Billboard is a part of Penske Media Corporation. Jay-Z is seen before the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match between Cote D'Ivoire and Ecuador at Philadelphia Stadium on June 14, 2026, in Philadelphia. With *4:44* celebrating its ninth anniversary on Tuesday (June 30), Jay-Z surprised fans by making three bonus tracks from the album available on all streaming platforms. The trio of songs — which feature collaborations with James Blake and Hov’s daughter Blue Ivy — were previously available on Tidal. Blue Ivy assists on “Blue’s Freestyle / We Family” and Blake returns for “ManyFacedGod,” which finds Jay addressing his union with Beyoncé, a prominent theme across *4:44*. Jay-Z released *4:44* on vinyl for the first time packaged as part of the JAŸ-Z: 30th Anniversary Collector’s Crate, which contains Hov’s 13 solo studio LPs and is available for $1,500 on Roc Nation’s website.

recentArticles.snippet: # Britney Spears' Son Sean Preston Heads to Europe Before Paris Fashion Week Gig With Jayden. ## Britney Spears' Sons Jet Off To Europe For Paris Fashion Week Gig. **Britney Spears**' eldest son, **Sean Preston Federline**, has taken off for Europe ahead of a major fashion moment with his younger brother ... The pop star's son was spotted departing Los Angeles last week after purchasing a one-way ticket, keeping a low profile as he made his way out of town in advance of his upcoming gig at Paris Fashion Week. Sean has been vacationing with friends in Zurich, Switzerland, before he reunites with his brother, **Jayden Federline**, in Paris. We're told the brothers are set to walk the runway at Paris Fashion Week together, marking a rare public appearance for Britney's sons and one of their biggest ventures into the fashion world yet. recentArticles.title: Kanye West ‘desperately seeking relevance’ with lavish Versailles birthday bash - Sky News Australia
recentArticles.snippet: This is a modal window. Escape will cancel and close the window. This modal can be closed by pressing the Escape key or activating the close button. ‘Kinsey Schofield Unfiltered’ host Kinsey Schofield claims Kanye West is “desperately seeking relevance” after hosting a nearly $400,000 masquerade-themed birthday party at the Palace of Versailles. “I think it’s Kanye desperately seeking relevance again … he seems convinced that bigger, louder and more expensive automatically means more relevant; I don’t think that’s true anymore,” Ms Schofield told Sky News host James Morrow. “There was a time when he dominated the culture because he is a very talented musician, but today he typically dominates headlines because of this spectacle. “The fascination has faded for a lot of people, and a lavish birthday party at Versailles doesn’t erase the damage he’s done.”. He will revive us after 2 days, on the 3rd day he will raise us up.BroRando |.

recentArticles.title: Jelly Roll Posts Jaw-Dropping Video of His 200-lb. Weight Loss - The Daily Beast
recentArticles.snippet: The Grammy-winning musician used the video to reflect on his shocking physical transformation. Jelly, whose real name is Jason DeFord, started the video with an old clip of himself from before his weight loss, walking with his head down in the pouring rain, looking exhausted. The video then cut to clips of his December 10 appearance on *The Joe Rogan Experience* podcast. “Every time I said I was going to lose the weight, Joe, I lied to myself,” he tells Rogan in the clip. “I would tell myself I’m going to do this. I’m going to go do that. And I wake up, and I’m like, ‘s--t.’”. I told y’all I was going to go do this walk, and I’m going to do this walk,’” he said. The video then showed more clips of Jelly’s first days walking in the rain before cutting to a present-day video of him running in the rain.

recentArticles.title: Bow Wow: Tiny Desk Concert - NPR
recentArticles.snippet: **Bow Wow: Tiny Desk Concert**  **Bow Wow's transformation from child star to well-rounded entertainer serves as a blueprint for longevity. ## **Tiny Desk**. # Bow Wow: Tiny Desk Concert. *This Black Music Month, Tiny Desk celebrates the undeniable legacy of BET. His transformation from child star to well-rounded entertainer serves as a blueprint for longevity, and honoring the impact and legacy of BET without him would have been incomplete. It's a loyalty that Bow Wow earned, and he basks in that glory as he blazes through his Tiny Desk concert full of back-to-back hits. The decades of dedication to his craft were evident in the cadence, stage presence and high-energy infused in performances of "Shortie Like Mine," "Fresh Azimiz" and "Let Me Hold You." Bow Wow also makes sure to include "Bounce with Me (from the motion picture *Big Momma's House*)," the song that started it all.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Surpasses Oscar-Winner to Become Highest Grossing Biopic - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: Michael Jackson was not only the King of Pop, he's also proving to be the King of the box-office. Almost two decades after his death, Jackson's biopic, "Michael" is creating history at the box-office while being set to touch the coveted $1 billion mark. As per the latest reports, "Michael" has also created history by becoming the highest grossing biopic of all time, dethroning Christopher Nolan's Oscar-winning 2023 mega-project "Oppenheimer.". The King of Pop's real-life nephew, Jaafar Jackson, portrays the role of Michael Jackson for the biopic. Despite the envious box-office numbers, the film opened to a moderate critics rating, as the Tomatometer rates the film at 38%. Despite the difference in the certifications of the two movies with "Michael" getting a PG-13, and Cillian Murphy-starrer "Oppenheimer" an R, the relevance of the "Thriller" hitmaker's biopic cannot be ignored. However, notwithstanding the criticism, the film is still doing well at the box-office, and on its way to grossing $1 billion.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了麥可傑克森的傳記電影《Michael》在票房上表現強勁，超越《奧本海默》成為史上最高票房傳記片，但內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’ - The Standard (HK)
recentArticles.snippet: # Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’. Rising singer-songwriter Jasmine Yen has marked her return to the music scene with the release of her latest single, “Roll With Me,” a bold and empowering anthem that signals a fresh, independent chapter in her burgeoning career. Yen uses a playful vocal delivery and distinct charisma to champion individuality and unfiltered self-expression, dedicating the project to a new era defined by complete creative freedom. Following the release, she took to social media to express gratitude to her creative team and her family, whom she credited as her ultimate source of support. A natural talent who began songwriting at just seven years old, the introverted artist turned to music as her primary emotional outlet, a passion that eventually earned her a scholarship to the prestigious Berklee College of Music. “Roll With Me” serves as the opening chapter of her new artistic journey, leaving fans highly expectant for her upcoming body of work.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要關於歌手嚴正嵐（Jasmine Yen）發行新單曲《Roll With Me》，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Beyoncé Joins Jay-Z as He Celebrates 'Reasonable Doubt' 30th Anniversary in New York City - Just Jared
recentArticles.snippet: # Beyoncé Joins Jay-Z as He Celebrates ‘Reasonable Doubt’ 30th Anniversary in New York City. **Beyoncé** is making a rare appearance to support husband **Jay-Z**! The 44-year-old “Alien Superstar” singer and the 56-year-old “Young Forever” rapper left his Roc Nation office building on Thursday night (June 25) in New York City. Earlier that day, **Jay** and the couple’s 14-year-old daughter **Blue Ivy Carter** stopped by his ***Reasonable Doubt Jay-Z30*** pop-up event to celebrated the 30th anniversary of his landmark debut album *Reasonable Doubt*, which he dropped back on June 25, 1996. In celebration of of the 30th anniversary of his debut album, along with the 25th anniversary of his *The Blueprint* album, **Jay** will be playing a trio of shows at Yankee Stadium in July, plus a finale concert called “Extra Innings.” He’ll then be heading to Paris and then Los Angeles for more anniversary shows! ***Browse through the gallery below for more photos of Beyoncé and Jay-Z in NYC…***.

recentArticles.title: Apple will launch 15+ new products this fall, here’s what’s coming - 9to5Mac
recentArticles.snippet: # Apple will launch 15+ new products this fall, here’s what’s coming. Apple has a packed lineup of product launches coming this fall, including new iPhones, Macs, iPads, and more. Here’s every new Apple product rumored to arrive later this year. ## iPhone 18 family, including the first Ultra model. Apple’s flagship iPhone 18 lineup will go ultra-premium this fall, dropping the base model iPhone 18 that’s rumored to arrive in early 2027 instead. ## Apple Watch Ultra 4 and Apple Watch Series 12. Apple is rumored to launch two new Apple Watch models this year: Apple Watch Ultra 4 and Apple Watch Series 12. ## MacBook Ultra, new M6 MacBook Pro, and M5 Mac Studio, more. It’s a big year for the Mac, with MacBook Neo and new MacBook Pro and MacBook Air models recently launched. A new iPad Air arrived earlier this year, but two more iPads are expected to launch before 2026 ends: an iPad mini with OLED and a new base-model iPad.

recentArticles.title: Watch Charli XCX Let Loose in Video for New Song “Wink Wink” - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: # Watch Charli XCX Let Loose in Video for New Song “Wink Wink”. It’s the pop star’s third preview of *Music, Fashion, Film*. With an hour’s notice and a bat of her eyelashes, Charli XCX ushered in her third single from *Music, Fashion, Film*, “Wink Wink.” The song gets a music video directed by frequent collaborator Aidan Zamiri, in which the pop star swears she’s “not a bad girl anymore.” Check it out below. “Wink Wink” arrives after the headline-baiting single “Rock Music” and the more traditionally pop-indebted “SS26.” Charli has denied that *Music, Fashion, Film* is a rock album, but it does seem like she got plenty of inspiration beyond the dance floor—or at least in terms of who she rang up to pose for its cover. Charli has a short arena tour planned to celebrate her upcoming release as well as a number of headlining sets at music festivals, including Lollapalooza and Outside Lands. Revisit the track review of Charli XCX’s “Rock Music.”.

Katy Perry is setting her past ablaze on new single “Watch It Burn,” which dropped Thursday night (June 25) alongside a cinematic new music video. On the cathartic pop-rock banger — which Perry performed before its release at both O Son do Camiño in Spain and Rock in Rio Lisboa — she sings about reclaiming her life by saying goodbye to a long-term relationship. Perry is now in a relationship with Justin Trudeau, whom she called “the love of my life” during a Q&A at the premiere of her Lifetimes Tour concert film in New York earlier in June. ## Katy Perry Finally Gets Angry on New Song ‘Watch It Burn’: Watch Fiery Video Now.

recentArticles.title: Keyon Harrold celebrates 100 years of Miles Davis at Carnegie Hall - VPM
recentArticles.snippet: *    On Air  Now Playing VPM News. *    On Air  Now Playing VPM Music. # Keyon Harrold celebrates 100 years of Miles Davis at Carnegie Hall. Image 3: Trumpeter Keyon Harrold backstage before the Miles Davis centennial concert at Carnegie Hall. Trumpeter Keyon Harrold backstage before the Miles Davis centennial concert at Carnegie Hall. To mark the occasion, trumpeter Keyon Harrold brought his band to Carnegie Hall's Zankel Hall for a night of tribute and celebration. In this episode of _Jazz Night in America,_ we'll feature a conversation about Davis between Harrold and Christian McBride, and listen to highlights from the concert at Carnegie Hall. **Setlist from Keyon Harrold and his group at Carnegie Hall**:. *   Medley: "Miles Ahead" (Davis, Evans); "Melancholy Aura" (Keyon Harrold); "Well Walk Now (Perseverance)" (Harrold). She also served as a producer for NYC Winter Jazzfest before landing the "job of her dreams," producing radio for Jazz Night in America. ### VPM News Morning Monitor is a daily newsletter that keeps you informed on news you care about.
